changelog: Scanner: fix 'Could not detect dates on page' on Agenda view — extract dates from rbcalendar-event class names directly when AgendaContainer is present
Scanner: extract all-day flag from the agenda 'All day' text and event-type color from the inner EventColorBar (agenda items have no bg color on the wrapper)
Scanner: accept agenda/weekly/daily as scrape-in-place views — only force-switch from monthly to agenda
